decisions.title: Adopt a durable job queue
decisions.context: Background work was lost on deploys. We need at-least-once delivery, observable retries, and a recovery path that does not depend on one application process staying alive.

alternatives.name: Managed durable queue
alternatives.summary: Use a hosted at-least-once queue with worker acknowledgements and retry policies.

alternatives.name: Database polling
alternatives.summary: Store jobs in the primary database and have workers poll for pending rows.
cons: Locking and retry logic become application concerns

alternatives.name: In-process retries
alternatives.summary: Keep work in application memory and retry failures within the running process.
